initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE element = 'Ca') > 0 THEN 
            CASE 
                WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE element = 'Ca' AND label LIKE '%carcinogen%') > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE element = 'Ca' AND label NOT LIKE '%carcinogen%') 
                THEN 'mostly carcinogenic'
                ELSE 'mostly non carcinogenic'
            END
        ELSE 'no molecules with Calcium'
    END AS carcinogenicity_status
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
LEFT JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) > 0 
        THEN 'carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.molecule_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS carcinogenic_status
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) > 
             COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) 
        THEN 'mostly carcinogenic' 
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic' 
    END AS classification
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Ca';

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM atom a 
            JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
            WHERE a.element = 'Ca'
        ) THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS carcinogenic_status;
